heroes.metaDescription: Learn about {name} in Spelltroum — abilities, best builds, strengths, weaknesses, and tips.

home.metaTitle: Spelltroum — Fast-Paced Mobile Multiplayer Battle Arena
home.metaDescription: Spelltroum is a free mobile battle arena game with 13 unique heroes, 30+ items, and quick skill-based matches. Play with friends on iOS and Android.
home.heroSubtitle: Upgrade spells, build powerful item combinations, and outsmart real players in fast-paced multiplayer arena battles.
home.feature1Desc: Explore powerful hero combinations that buff and complement each other. Choose from mages, archers, warriors, shamans and more — each with a unique playstyle.
home.feature2Desc: 30 items unlocked from the start. Build a personalized set of four items, experiment with combinations, and find the strategy that fits your hero and playstyle.
home.feature3Desc: Quick, skill-based matches on a dynamic arena. Farm resources, destroy bushes, collect runes, and dominate the battlefield before your opponents do.
home.discordDesc: Share strategies, give feedback to the devs, join content creator programs, and learn about new features before everyone else.
